description: Schema describing military, corporate, or organizational formations such as fleets, armies, task forces, or strike groups.

name.description: Human readable name of the formation.

parent_faction.description: Faction controlling or operating this formation.

formation_class.description: General classification of the formation such as fleet, strike force, security fleet, etc.

operational_role.description: Primary mission roles performed by the formation.

deployment_model.description: Describes how the formation is deployed structurally (permanent fleet, distributed security force, temporary strike force, etc.).

command_model.description: Command structure model such as centralized command, distributed command, or dual command.

command_structure.description: Narrative or structural description of command layers.

operational_area.description: Locations or systems where the formation operates.

culture.description: Internal cultural traits of the formation.

reputation.description: How the formation is perceived historically or culturally.

doctrine.description: Operational doctrine or phases used in engagements.

strategic_objective.description: Strategic goals of the formation in a given conflict.

historical_role.description: Historical context of the formation in a specific event or conflict.

fleet_size.description: Total number of ships or vehicles assigned to the formation.

composition.description: General description of the formation's ship or vehicle classes.

personnel.description: Personnel structure and role distribution of the formation.

total_personnel.description: Total number of personnel assigned to the formation.

roles.description: Roles and job positions within the formation.

assets.description: Inventory of vehicles and equipment assigned to the formation.
